name: Modal Terminal Escape
description: Repair three corrupt editor fields, write and quit, then escape a seed-varying stack of terminal modes.
natural_language: Repair every manifest field to match the posted target, write and quit the editor, then escape every remaining modal terminal layer.

metadata.notes: The browser terminal records ordinary keydown events and replays editor modes, individual buffer mutations, :wq, and a randomized pager/job/SSH exit stack. Paste and final-state claims are not accepted.
